title: Jiho Kim
text:
Hi there! I am a junior at Calvin University studying Computer Science. I am currently working as a research assistant with Dr. Kenneth Arnold. We are researching an AI writing tool that gives users more creative freedom and control over their content.
My research interests are in human-computer interaction, natural language processing, and data science. I am actively seeking research opportunities and hoping to pursue a PhD in the future.
